---
title: "Discovery Bay, Jamaica"
description: "Eileen Graham's Discovery Bay, Jamaica Collection (1966)"
image: "https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg"   # thumbnail shown in the listing grid
categories: [Jamaica]
page-layout: article
---

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

![](https://dn721802.ca.archive.org/0/items/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054_medium.jpg){.lightbox group="discovery-bay" description="Discovery Bay, Jamaica. [View on Archive.org.](https://archive.org/details/e5cf7835-a289-43da-a37e-115f1cbcf5d6/db054.png)"}

:::
